calendar.matters:
First Account (5/23/14-12/31/16) And Petition For Settlement Of Account And Approval And Payment Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Cummins for and with Darry Louie (Petitioner).
Joseph Gruber for and with David Louie and Dorothy Louie (Co-Trustees).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the requested attorney's fees and whether or not representation was provided on an individual/personal basis. The First Account, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Z. Grimaldi. Not reported.
